{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Silver constructs
| introduced = City of Light
}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Silver constructs]] approach [[Alin]] radiating panic.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c26">''City of Light'', chapter 26</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Traveler's Gate nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
